data.change_summary: Verified the already-applied fix end to end: `AgentExecutionService` now preserves adapter-reported `backend_used` and `model_used`, invocation-backed artifact producers in the completion, prompt-review, and final-review workflows now populate `producer.backend_family` and `producer.model_id` from `InvocationEnvelope.metadata`, and persisted artifact JSON continues to serialize those fields unchanged through the filesystem adapter. No additional code edits were needed in this round; the remaining work was executable validation.

steps.description: Confirmed the current implementation preserves adapter-reported backend/model metadata in `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs` and uses envelope metadata when constructing `RecordProducer::Agent` in the completion, prompt-review, and final-review persistence paths.

Confirmed no further implementation changes were needed because `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs` already sourced producer metadata from `InvocationEnvelope.metadata` and `src/adapters/fs.rs` serializes the resulting `ArtifactRecord` without transforming producer fields.
Ran executable validation with the Nix-provided Rust toolchain: `cargo check`, the targeted service regression, the targeted persisted-artifact regression, and the full `cargo test --lib` suite.

validation_evidence: `nix develop -c cargo --version`, `nix develop -c rustc --version`, and `nix develop -c rustfmt --version` succeeded, providing Cargo 1.93.0, Rust 1.93.0, and rustfmt 1.8.0 for executable validation.

`nix develop -c cargo check` completed successfully. The only diagnostics were pre-existing unused `spawned` warnings in `src/contexts/conformance_spec/runner.rs:108`, `src/contexts/conformance_spec/runner.rs:124`, and `src/contexts/conformance_spec/runner.rs:179`.
`nix develop -c cargo test --lib invoke_preserves_adapter_reported_backend_and_model_metadata` passed with 1 test passed and 0 failed.
`nix develop -c cargo test --lib persisted_artifacts_use_envelope_metadata_not_resolved_target` passed with 1 test passed and 0 failed.
`nix develop -c cargo test --lib` passed with 86 tests passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored, and 0 filtered out.

Static inspection confirms `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:219-246` preserves adapter-reported metadata, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/completion.rs:138-141`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:111-114`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:170-173`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:239-242`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:351-354`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:443-446`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:559-562` build `RecordProducer::Agent` from envelope metadata, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:4647-4650` already did so, and `src/adapters/fs.rs:1105-1106` serializes the artifact record unchanged.
